chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 06 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.01.2016 1. For Orders on Office Objection 2. For Katcha Peshi Mr. Noor Ahmed Rabbani, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Agha Waqar Ahmed, Advocate for Petitioner Ch. Bashir Ahmed Asstt. A.G. a/w SIP Shafi Bangash for SSP Hyderabad and ASI Asghar Jamali for SHO PS Qasimabad, Hyderabad. This petition has been filed by the petitioner against the alleged harassment caused to him by the private respondent Nos. 8 to 11. Mr. Munawar Ali Channa, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent Nos. 8, 9 and 11 and has denied the allegations. The official respondents are present and state that there is a dispute between the private respondents and the petitioner over the land and no harassment has been caused to the petitioner. In view of the above this petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE *Karar/-
